name: Wise Group AB (publ)
summary: Wise Group AB (publ) provides recruitment and consultancy services in Sweden and internationally. The company develops people and businesses for HR, outplacement, and development and change; builds IT organizations for individuals and businesses; recruits managers and business specialists throughout the Nordic countries; and recruits people within communication, information, marketing, and media fields. It also offers leadership training; recruitment and consultant staffing in accounting, finance, and business administration; and digital information services, HR systems, and training, as well as builds the sales organizations Wise Group AB (publ) is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
